scripts.dev: npm run dev:landing & npm run dev:foodlocal-pro & npm run dev:food-basic & npm run dev:products-local & npm run dev:productslocalchat & npm run dev:productslocalemail & npm run dev:serviceslocalwhatsapp & npm run dev:serviceslocalchat & npm run dev:serviceslocalemail
scripts.build: npm run build:landing && npm run build:foodlocal-pro && npm run build:food-basic && npm run build:products-local && npm run build:productslocalchat && npm run build:productslocalemail && npm run build:serviceslocalwhatsapp && npm run build:serviceslocalchat && npm run build:serviceslocalemail
scripts.install:all: cd landing && npm install && cd ../foodlocal-pro && npm install && cd ../food-basic && npm install && cd ../products-local && npm install && cd ../productslocalchat && npm install && cd ../productslocalemail && npm install && cd ../serviceslocalwhatsapp && npm install && cd ../serviceslocalchat && npm install && cd ../serviceslocalemail && npm install
